who_they_serve.verbatim: Whether you're managing symptoms, recovering from pain, or proactively investing in your long-term health

value: Years of not getting real answers from conventional medicine
Seeking a more complete picture of health
Ready for a big change or needing a slower approach

situations.verbatim: Many of our patients come to us after years of not getting real answers, never getting the time or attention they needed to explore the root of their symptoms.

value: Clinical Care Team: collaborative team of doctors, clinicians, NPs, and clinical care coordinators
Comprehensive Testing: deeper than standard labs, analyzing gut health, inflammation, nutrient markers, and metabolic function
Personalized Treatment: care plans tailored to symptoms, history, lifestyle, and goals
Whole-Body Wellness: holistic support for nutrition, stress, sleep, and movement
Time and attention, not rushed care: deeper evaluations, longer appointments
Expert interpretation, not just information: doctors translate lab insights into clear action
Continuity: same provider across visits, tracking patterns and progress
Connected care, not fragmented episodes: clinical team works across specialties
100+ expert providers across 16+ locations plus virtual care in 21 states
differentiators.verbatim: We go beyond symptoms to find answers.

philosophy.value: Root cause, integrative, evidence-based medicine. Instead of masking symptoms, the goal is to restore optimal function throughout the body using science-based medicine combined with traditional modalities. Healthcare is personalized, team-based, and designed for the whole person.
philosophy.verbatim: Instead of looking for ways to mask your symptoms, our goal is to restore optimal function throughout your body.

description.value: Free 15-minute consultation for acupuncture patients to assess individual situation and suggest course of treatment
description.verbatim: Our practitioners are happy to meet with you for a free 15-minute consultation to assess your individual situation and offer a suggested course of treatment.

consult_expectations.value: Deeper evaluations with longer appointments than typical practices. Care plans evolve with patient's life. Doctors spend time both before and after visits interpreting test results and devising next steps. Same provider across visits for continuity.
consult_expectations.verbatim: We offer deeper evaluations, longer appointments, and care plans that evolve with your life.

follow_up.value: Ongoing care managed by clinical care coordinator who handles logistics, appointments, and communication. Doctors interpret results and devise next steps after each visit. Treatment frequency depends on nature and severity of condition. Acupuncture benefits are cumulative. Massage patients may benefit from weekly or monthly sessions.
follow_up.verbatim: Your care doesn't stop when the visit ends. Behind the scenes, our doctors spend time both before and after your visit interpreting your test results and devising your next step.

details.value: Massage Wellness Plan: $85/month for one 55-minute massage (normally $110, $25 savings per visit), roll over up to 3 sessions. IV Vitamin Therapy Membership: $150/1x per month or $275/2x per month (base price $179 per session).
details.verbatim: $85/month for one 55-minute massage per month (normally $110, a $25 savings per visit). Roll over up to three sessions with no penalty.

value: Standard massage session: $110 (implied from wellness plan savings)
